即使；尽管；虽然=in spite of 用法小结：Despite all her efforts to control it，her voice was shaking尽管她尽力控制她的声音仍在颤抖 Despite applying for hundreds of jobs，he is still out of work. 尽管申请了数百个工作他仍在失业中 Despite the fact that she found it boring，She was good at physics. 尽管她认为物理枯燥无味却学得很好
He (has) proved a good man in the end. 最后/事实证明他是个好人 It has proved that he is a good

The theory he’s stuck to proves/has proved to us that earthquakes can be forecast. 他所坚持的这一理论向我们证明了地震是可以预测的 再次说明prove一般只考主动用法。Reading extensively (has) proved to be an effective way of learning English. 事实证明泛读是英语学习的有效途径/方式=It (has) proved that reading extensively is (was对应proved) an effective way of learning English

一般不能作(前置)定语。另外，二者后接非谓语的用法再总结一次：be worth doing=be worthy of being done=be worthy to be done

words.zh: 表面/层；水/地/液面；外表；浮出/升到水面；显露；重新出现smooth surface 光滑的平面 uneven surface 凹凸不平的表/地面 on the surface 表面上/乍一看 It seems like a good idea on the surface but there are sure to be problems. 表面上看来不错但肯定存在问题。The ducks dived and surfaced again several meters away 鸭子潜入水中然后在几米外又钻出水面 Doubts began to surface.质疑(声) 开始出现
